message:
fix(reliability): prevent resource leaks and handler panics

tracker: Close pipes when cmd.Start() fails in gitCheckIgnored
- stdin pipe leaked if StdoutPipe() failed
- both pipes leaked if Start() failed

events: Add panic recovery to event handlers in Publish/PublishSync
- Prevents panicking handlers from crashing the process
- Handlers run in goroutines and crashes would be silent without recovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
